parameters.content:
## Project Starter — Core sub-workflow (native nodes)

📎 **參考來源 / Source**: ported from [mihozip/google-workspace-admin-project-workflow](https://github.com/mihozip/google-workspace-admin-project-workflow) `src/Code.gs` @ `fce2513`. Line-by-line provenance in `PROVENANCE.md`.

Input: `{ data, config }` from an entry workflow (Form Trigger or Webhook).

**data** — the form response, keyed by Apps Script field name (專案名稱, 承辦處室, …).
**config** — `{ ROOT_FOLDER_ID, CONTROL_SHEET_ID, CALENDAR_ID, ADMIN_EMAIL, TIMEZONE }`.

Does:
1. Validate required fields, build project code + sanitized folder name
2. Create project folder under `03_專案資料夾` + 11 subfolders (Google Drive node)
3. Create empty 9-section project record Doc (Google Docs node), then apply Heading styles via HTTP `documents.batchUpdate` ⚠️
4. Create 待辦追蹤表 spreadsheet (Google Sheets), append 10 default tasks (Google Sheets), apply dropdown + format via HTTP `spreadsheets.batchUpdate` ⚠️
5. Create 成果檢核表 similarly
6. Move all 3 generated files into `99_系統產生文件` (Google Drive)
7. Create Calendar all-day events (Google Calendar node)
8. Append row to 行政專案總控表 (Google Sheets)
9. Email the 承辦人 (Gmail)
10. Return summary to caller

**Credentials needed** (5 separate, see `docs/google-credentials.md`):
- `googleDriveOAuth2Api`
- `googleDocsOAuth2Api`
- `googleSheetsOAuth2Api`
- `googleCalendarOAuth2Api`
- `gmailOAuth2`
+ 1 generic `googleApi` for the 3 batchUpdate HTTP nodes (Drive scope unused, just needs Docs + Sheets scope).

parameters.queryString: =name='03_專案資料夾' and mimeType='application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and '{{ $json.config.ROOT_FOLDER_ID }}' in parents and trashed=false

parameters.content:
### ⚠️ HTTP fallback — Docs heading styles

The native **Google Docs** node (`n8n-nodes-base.googleDocs`) only exposes `insertText` and `replaceText` actions — it has **no operation for applying paragraph styles** (HEADING_1 / TITLE).

We call `POST https://docs.googleapis.com/v1/documents/{docId}:batchUpdate` directly with an `updateParagraphStyle` request per heading span (precomputed in the `Prepare` node as `docRequests`).

This is the only way to recreate the upstream Apps Script behaviour `body.appendParagraph(...).setHeading(...)`.

Same Google account; just needs Docs scope. Credential type: `googleApi` (generic OAuth2) so we don't have to add a 7th credential type.

nodes.name: Move Doc to 99_系統產生文件

parameters.jsCode:
const prep = $('Carry Doc id').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...prep, docUrl: `https://docs.google.com/document/d/${prep.docId}/edit` } }];

parameters.content:
### ⚠️ HTTP fallback — Sheets dropdown + header format

The native **Google Sheets** node has no operation for:
- `setDataValidation` (the 狀態 column dropdown — required by upstream behaviour)
- `repeatCell` formatting (bold + light-blue header row)
- `updateSheetProperties` (frozen row count)

We call `POST https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/{id}:batchUpdate` with all 3 requests in one body (precomputed as `taskBatchUpdate` in `Prepare`).

Same Google account; needs Sheets scope. Reuses the same generic `googleApi` credential as the Doc batchUpdate call.

parameters.subject: =【行政專案已建立】{{ $('Build control row').first().json._carry.data['專案名稱'] }}

main.node: Move Doc to 99_系統產生文件
